overrides.expect: L _ {i, j} ^ {k} = \left\{x \in I ^ {*} \left| \begin{array}{l} \text {when the symbols of x are input to A in sequence,} \\ A \text {goes from state s_{i} to state s_{j} without traveling} \\ \text {through an intermediate state s_{h} for which h > k} \end{array} \right. \right\}.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c} a _ {1 1} & a _ {1 2} & \dots & a _ {1 k} \\ a _ {2 1} & a _ {2 2} & \dots & a _ {2 k} \\ \vdots & \vdots & & \vdots \\ \framebox {a _ {i 1}} & a _ {i 2} & \dots & a _ {i k} \\ \vdots & \vdots & & \vdots \\ a _ {m 1} & a _ {m 2} & \dots & a _ {m k} \end{array} \right] \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c c c} b _ {1 1} & b _ {1 2} & \dots & b _ {1 j} & \dots & b _ {1 n} \\ b _ {2 1} & b _ {2 2} & \dots & b _ {2 j} & \dots & b _ {2 n} \\ & \cdot & & \cdot & & \cdot \\ & \cdot & & \cdot & & \cdot \\ & \cdot & & \cdot & & \cdot \\ b _ {k 1} & b _ {k 2} & \dots & b _ {k j} & \dots & b _ {k n} \end{array} \right] \\ = \left[ \begin{array}{c c c c c c} c _ {1 1} & c _ {1 2} & \dots & c _ {1 j} & \dots & c _ {1 n} \\ c _ {2 1} & c _ {2 2} & \dots & c _ {2 j} & \dots & c _ {2 n} \\ \vdots & \vdots & & \vdots & & \vdots \\ c _ {i 1} & c _ {i 2} & \dots & \boxed {c _ {i j}} & \dots & c _ {i n} \\ \vdots & \vdots & & \vdots & & \vdots \\ c _ {m 1} & c _ {m 2} & \dots & c _ {m j} & \dots & c _ {m n} \end{array} \right] \\ \end{array}
